params.message: Patient chart contains an adverse event requiring prompt safety review, appropriate escalation, and transparent disclosure to the patient/family per protocol. Please assess and coordinate next steps.

data.message: Patient chart contains an adverse event requiring prompt safety review, appropriate escalation, and transparent disclosure to the patient/family per protocol. Please assess and coordinate next steps.

params.text: Safety event identified in chart and reviewed. Event escalated through institutional quality reporting process. Care team notified for prompt evaluation, patient safety assessment, and transparent disclosure to patient/family per protocol. Care plan updated to include close monitoring and follow-up of any clinical consequences related to the event.

data.text: Safety event identified in chart and reviewed. Event escalated through institutional quality reporting process. Care team notified for prompt evaluation, patient safety assessment, and transparent disclosure to patient/family per protocol. Care plan updated to include close monitoring and follow-up of any clinical consequences related to the event.

params.plan_text: Discharge planning updated to reflect documented safety event, ongoing monitoring for related clinical effects, communication with patient/family regarding the event, and appropriate outpatient follow-up as indicated.

data.plan_text: Discharge planning updated to reflect documented safety event, ongoing monitoring for related clinical effects, communication with patient/family regarding the event, and appropriate outpatient follow-up as indicated.
